word: G2485 - ἰχθύδιον - ichthýdion - ikh-thoo'-dee-on - Little fish

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἰχθύδιον

- Transliteration: Ichthudion

- Phonetic: ikh-thoo'-dee-on

- Definition:

1. a little fish

- Origin: diminutive from G2486

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Diminutive from G2486; a petty fish: - little (small) fish.
